videos.title: Reading and Writing 4 and 5 Digit Numbers
videos.description: Learn how to read and write large numbers with 4 and 5 digits. Practice saying numbers in words and writing them in numerals using the Indian number system.
learningObjectives: Read 4 and 5 digit numbers aloud correctly
keyConceptsCovered: Indian number system for large numbers

videos.title: Expanded Form of Large Numbers
videos.description: Understand expanded form of 4 and 5 digit numbers. Break numbers like 45,328 into 40,000 + 5,000 + 300 + 20 + 8 and learn how each digit has a different value.
learningObjectives: Convert expanded form back to standard form
Understand why expanded form shows place value clearly
keyConceptsCovered: Breaking numbers into place value components
Relationship between expanded and standard forms

videos.title: Place Value Practice | All Forms of 5-Digit Numbers
videos.description: Practice writing 5-digit numbers in standard form, expanded form, and word form. Strengthen your understanding of place value with plenty of examples and exercises.
learningObjectives: Fluently convert between standard, expanded, and word forms
Identify errors in written number forms
Build speed and confidence with large numbers

videos.title: 3-Digit Place Value Review
videos.description: Review place value for 3-digit numbers. Understand the ones, tens, and hundreds places and how each digit's position determines its value.
learningObjectives: Connect 3-digit expanded form to 5-digit expanded form
keyConceptsCovered: Bridge to understanding larger number forms

excellent_performance.description: For students who scored >= 90% on readiness
excellent_performance.rationale: Core reading, writing, and expanded form for strong students

ready_performance.description: For students who scored 80-89% on readiness
ready_performance.rationale: Complete coverage of reading and writing with place value review

partial_readiness.description: For students who scored 50-79% on readiness
partial_readiness.rationale: Start with place value review, then reading and expanded form

after_prerequisite_review.description: For students who scored < 50% but completed prerequisites
after_prerequisite_review.rationale: Essential reading and expanded form only

questions.question: What is the expanded form of 72,405?
questions.explanation: 72,405 = 70,000 + 2,000 + 400 + 0 + 5. Since the tens digit is 0, we can also write it as 70,000 + 2,000 + 400 + 5.

usageNotes.teacherGuidance: Have students practise reading large numbers aloud in class. Use number cards to build 5-digit numbers and ask students to read them and write the expanded form on the board.
usageNotes.parentGuidance: Look at large numbers in newspapers, bills, or price tags together. Ask your child to read them aloud and write them in expanded form.
usageNotes.studentGuidance: Reading big numbers is like reading a sentence. Break the number into groups and read each group. Practice with numbers you see every day!
